# PostCompare.eu

> European postal service price comparator. Compare letter and parcel rates across 32 countries.

## API / Data Access
The postal rate data is available as YAML files in the open-source repository.
Each operator has a YAML file at data/operators/{operator-id}.yaml

## Data Format
Operator files contain: domestic letter rates, international letter rates (by zone), domestic parcel rates, international parcel rates (by zone). All prices in EUR.

## Supported Countries
EU27 + EFTA (CH, NO, IS, LI) + UK = 32 countries

## Available Operators
- La Poste (France) - data/operators/la-poste-fr.yaml
- Deutsche Post (Germany) - data/operators/deutsche-post-de.yaml
- Correos (Spain) - data/operators/correos-es.yaml
- Royal Mail (United Kingdom) - data/operators/royal-mail-gb.yaml

## Languages
Available in French (fr), English (en), and German (de).
